fields.description: What this action does when the rule fires. Actions run top-to-bottom.
fields.label: Action Type
fields.options:
Create Task
Set Field
Append Child Row
Upsert Child Row
Call Webhook

fields.description: Schema fieldname whose datetime value becomes the new task's due date. Blank = a default lead time.
fields.label: Due From Field

fields.description: The activity type to raise as an open task when this rule fires.
fields.label: Task Type

fields.description: DocType the field is written to (e.g. CRM Lead). Must be in the Automatable-Field allowlist for this grain.
fields.label: Target DocType

fields.description: The fieldname to set on the target doctype.
fields.label: Fieldname

fields.description: Literal = use the Value as-is. From Context = read the named Context Field from the completed task's activity context.
fields.label: Value Mode

fields.description: Schema fieldname in the completed task's activity context whose value is written.
fields.label: Context Field

fields.description: CRM Lead child-table fieldname to write into, e.g. custom_lab_profile.
fields.label: Child Table

fields.description: JSON {child_fieldname: value} identifying the row to update; if none matches, a new row is appended. Each key must be an enabled row-key in the allowlist. Use "$ctx.<field>" to pull from the activity context.
fields.label: Match (JSON)

fields.description: JSON {child_fieldname: value} to set on the row. Each key must be in the allowlist for this grain. Use "$ctx.<field>" to pull from the activity context; otherwise the value is literal.
fields.label: Set (JSON)

fields.description: The configured outbound endpoint to call (native Webhook, delivery-only). Admin-curated; the rule only picks it.
fields.label: Webhook Endpoint
